igcfi__farm_business_income_statement.name: Gross cash farm income
igcfi__farm_business_income_statement.description: For farms participating in government programs, gross cash farm income is the total amount of cash received by the farm operation from the sale of agricultural products, services rendered, or government payments received during a given calendar year.

iliv__farm_business_income_statement.name: Livestock income
iliv__farm_business_income_statement.description: The value of all livestock and poultry sold from the farm operation net of any marketing charges.  All sales of livestock through marketing contracts or payments received from prior years' contracts are also included.  For integrated operations, which do not sell the livestock but pass them on to another phase of the operation, an estimate of the value of the livestock moving through the operation is captured as sales.

icrop__farm_business_income_statement.name: Crop sales
icrop__farm_business_income_statement.description: The amount received from cash sales and marketing or forward contracts for all crops plus the difference between Commodity Credit Corporation crop placements and redemptions.  Payments received for crops produced in previous years or delivered under prior year's marketing contracts are included.

igovt__farm_business_income_statement.name: Government payments
igovt__farm_business_income_statement.description: Gross value of direct government payments received by farm operations during the calendar year. Programs for which payments are received include: direct payments, counter-cyclical payments, loan deficiency payments (LDPs), marketing loan gains, peanut quota buyout program, milk income loss contract payments, disaster payments, conservation reserve program (CRP), wetlands reserve program (WRP), environmental quality incentive program (EQIP), and all other Federal and State programs.

iothfm__farm_business_income_statement.name: Other farm-related income
iothfm__farm_business_income_statement.description: Includes income from machine-hire, custom work, livestock grazing, land rental, contract production fees, outdoor recreation, timber sales,  hedging profit or losses, insurance indemnities, cooperative patronage dividends and refunds, leasing of livestock and machinery or equipment, and any other farm-related source.

etot__farm_business_income_statement.name: Total cash expenses
etot__farm_business_income_statement.description: Cash expenses represent the total amount of funds paid out by the farm operation during a calendar year.  Expenses paid by landlords or parties for which a contractual agreement existed during the year are excluded from cash expenses reported for farm operations.  Marketing charges such as commissions, storage, inspection, insurance, drying, check-offs, yardage, and auction are excluded from cash expenses.

evtot__farm_business_income_statement.name: Variable expenses
evtot__farm_business_income_statement.description: Expenses incurred in the production process that vary with the quantity and prices of inputs used.

evlvpur__farm_business_income_statement.name: Livestock purchases
evlvpur__farm_business_income_statement.description: The total amount paid for livestock and poultry including commission, yardage, insurance and other associated fees. Breeding livestock treated as a depreciable capital is not included.

evfeed__farm_business_income_statement.name: Feed
evfeed__farm_business_income_statement.description: Amount paid by the farm operation for all feed grains, hay, forages, mixed or formula feeds, concentrates, supplements, premixes, salt, minerals, animal byproducts, and all other feed additives and ingredients.

evloth__farm_business_income_statement.name: Other livestock-related
evloth__farm_business_income_statement.description: Amount paid by the farm operation during the calendar year for livestock leasing; custom feed processing, grinding or mixing of feed; bedding, litter, or straw; pasturing, grazing or custom feeding, veterinarian services or supplies, amount spent for sprays, dips, dusts or any other chemicals, sheep sheering, horse-shoeing, removal of dead animals, branding, artificial insemination and breeding fees, and performance testing.

evseedp__farm_business_income_statement.name: Seed and plants
evseedp__farm_business_income_statement.description: Expenses for purchases of seeds, plants, and related expenses such as seed cleaning, inoculation, rooting hormones, bagging, germinating, and delinting

evfertc__farm_business_income_statement.name: Fertilizer and chemicals
evfertc__farm_business_income_statement.description: Amount the farm operation paid for commercial fertilizers, lime and soil conditioners, pesticides, insecticides, herbicides, fungicides, defoliants, nematicides, fumigants, growth regulators, and rodenticides used on crops, pasture, acreage idled under government programs, seeds, crop storage buildings or seed beds.

evutil__farm_business_income_statement.name: Utilities
evutil__farm_business_income_statement.description: Farm operations' share of expenses for electricity, telephone, and water including charges for irrigation water and electricity.

evlabor__farm_business_income_statement.name: Labor
evlabor__farm_business_income_statement.description: Expenses for contract and hired labor engaged in "agricultural work" during the calendar year.  Total cash wages include bonuses for all hired workers(including paid family members) and employees' share of social security taxes.  Costs associated with fringe benefits such as insurance, pensions, workers compensation, and unemployment compensation are also included in labor expense.  Wages paid to operators that are not hired managers are excluded.

evfuelo__farm_business_income_statement.name: Fuels and oils
evfuelo__farm_business_income_statement.description: Farm share of the operations' purchases of diesel, gasoline, liquid petroleum, natural gas, other fuels (kerosene, coal, wood), and motor oils and fluids. Includes fuels used for heating farm buildings and offices, drying or curing crops, and all machinery and equipment (including irrigation pumps).

evmainr__farm_business_income_statement.name: Repairs and maintenance
evmainr__farm_business_income_statement.description: Amount paid by the operation for repairs and maintenance of motor vehicles, machinery and equipment, irrigation and frost protection equipment, farm buildings, the operator's dwelling, and any other labor dwellings, fencing, soil conservation structures, drainage structures, and any other farm or ranch structures (corrals, feedlots, feeding floors).

evcwork__farm_business_income_statement.name: Machine-hire and custom work
evcwork__farm_business_income_statement.description: Amount spent by the operation for custom hauling and other custom work such as land tillage, planting or seeding, harvesting, and soil testing.  Custom work is defined as work preformed by machines and labor hired as a unit.

evoth__farm_business_income_statement.name: Other variable expenses
evoth__farm_business_income_statement.description: Includes supplies, motor vehicle registration fees, transportation and storage, and all other general business expenses (for example, fees paid to accountants or attorneys, registration of purebred animals, travel expenses, postage, and magazine subscriptions).

eftot__farm_business_income_statement.name: Fixed expenses
eftot__farm_business_income_statement.description: Represents costs incurred by the farm operation during the calendar year, even when there is no production.

eftaxes__farm_business_income_statement.name: Real estate and property taxes
eftaxes__farm_business_income_statement.description: Expenses for taxes on farm land, buildings, capital improvements, machines, livestock, and other property.  Includes all taxes paid during the calendar year even though they may have been levied in another year.

efint__farm_business_income_statement.name: Interest
efint__farm_business_income_statement.description: Amount paid by the farm operation for interest on farm business loans and mortgages, land contracts, and other farm loans secured by real estate, finance charges for operating loans, machinery and equipment loans, or any other interest on non-real estate loans.

efins__farm_business_income_statement.name: Insurance premiums
efins__farm_business_income_statement.description: Amount spent by the farm operation for Federal Crop Insurance, and the farm share of motor vehicle, liability, and blanket policies which provide more than one year's coverage.

efrent__farm_business_income_statement.name: Rent and lease payments
efrent__farm_business_income_statement.description: Expenses for land rental (including Public Industrial Grazing Association land), all vehicles, tractors, farm machinery, equipment, and structures leased.

incfi__farm_business_income_statement.name: Net cash farm income
incfi__farm_business_income_statement.description: This measure indicates the amount of net cash earnings from all business sources that a farm generates during the year.  These funds can be used to repay principal on indebtedness, purchase new machinery or equipment, expand the farm business, or pay for family consumption or other obligations.

inmon__farm_business_income_statement.name: Nonmoney income
inmon__farm_business_income_statement.description: An estimated value of items produced and consumed on the farm, and the imputed rental value of farm dwellings.

ivalinv__farm_business_income_statement.name: Value of inventory change
ivalinv__farm_business_income_statement.description: The change in the market value of all crops, livestock, or purchased inputs from January 1 of the calendar to December 31.

endepr__farm_business_income_statement.name: Depreciation
endepr__farm_business_income_statement.description: An allocation of the portion of the original cost of a capital asset to each of the estimated years in which the asset will be used.  The type of depreciation reported on the survey typically resembles the figure reported on tax returns.

enben__farm_business_income_statement.name: Labor, non-cash benefits
enben__farm_business_income_statement.description: Includes an estimate of the value of housing or lodging provided to workers, meals, fuel, vehicles, utilities, or payment in kind. An estimate of the value of products produced and consumed on the farm is provided by the survey respondent. The imputed rental value of farm dwellings is calculated for dwellings located on the farm and is based on rent-to-value ratios for different value ranges of the dwelling.

breedingadj__farm_business_income_statem.name: Adjusted breeding livestock income
breedingadj__farm_business_income_statem.description: The amount of unrecovered investment in breeding livestock upon sale, reflecting the difference between gross proceeds from the sale and the recognized gain after accounting for investment costs.

infi__farm_business_income_statement.name: Net farm income
infi__farm_business_income_statement.description: Net farm income indicates the profit or loss associated with current production. It represents the return (both monetary and nonmonetary) to farm operators for their labor, management and capital after all production expenses have been paid (that is, gross farm income minus production expenses). It includes net income from farm production as well as net income attributed to the rental value of farm dwellings, the value of commodities consumed on the farm, depreciation, and inventory changes.
